  • SEARCH: 
 

Package i5.cb.graph

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    GEConstants  
    IFrameWorker
    Every graphInternalFrame may have a thread running in background which implements this interface, so that it can give us some info about its working progress.
    ILangChangeable
    This interface is implemented by all classes beeing able to serve information or labels in more than one language depending on the java language property
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DiagramDesktop
    Description of the Class
    DiagramDesktopGLayouter
    This class is responsible for calculating the layout of the graph.
    GECommand
    ActionListener for all possible actions that can be chosen in the menuBar
    GELFileChooser
    GELFileChooser is like JFileChooser but allows to tick a checkbox on including Telos module sources
    GEUtil
    This class contains a few static methods suitable for more than one GraphEditor application
    GraphEditor
    The basic of all GraphEditor Components.
    GraphInternalFrame
    This class'es instances are the windows inside the GraphEditor-Mainwindow
    GraphMenu
    The main purpose of this extension of JMenu is the implementation of the ILangChangeable interface.
    GraphMenuBar
    The menu bar of the GraphEditor.
    GraphMenuItem
    The main purpose of this extension of JMenuItem is the implementation of the ILangChangeable interface.
    GraphPopup
    This Class is instanciated the firsts time a user rightclicks on a DiagramNode.
